title: G5: Identify the limit law as $F_{\mathrm{TW}_2}$

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Granting the correct scale, identifying the GUE Tracy--Widom law $F_{\mathrm{TW}_2}$ (Fredholm determinant of the Airy kernel) requires one of:

(i) **Riemann--Hilbert / steepest-descent** edge asymptotics of an exact kernel or Toeplitz determinant for $\mathbb P_{\mu_n}(L\le\ell)$ (depends on G2(a)); or
(ii) a **coupling** to a model already known to have $F_{\mathrm{TW}_2}$ edge fluctuations — Poissonized Hammersley LPP / uniform RSK — with the coupling error shown to be $o(b_n)=o(n^{1/3})$ (depends on G2(b) and G7).

Gap: carry out the asymptotic analysis or the coupling, prove convergence in distribution to $F_{\mathrm{TW}_2}$, and (if Poissonization is used) include the de-Poissonization step (see G7). State the Airy-kernel / Tracy--Widom theorem precisely and verify its hypotheses.
